description:
As the closing manager, import the store inventory from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\store_inventory.csv into Copper Point of Sale (30 items across five categories) and perform the quarterly financial close.

Reconcile the system inventory against the quarterly physical count at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\physical_count.csv (15 items audited) — where system quantities differ from physical counts, adjust master stock levels to match.

Add customer Sheryl Baxter (sheryl.baxter@email.com, (310) 555-0147, Los Angeles CA 90210), sell her 1x Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Gen) for $249.99 cash, and process a return of those AirPods with a 15% restocking fee.

Process a clearance sale of 1x Zipped Jacket and 1x Black Leather Bag each at 30% off their listed prices, cash payment.

Export the updated inventory to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\final_inventory.csv. Create C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\quarterly_close.txt containing: a shrinkage table (Item Name | System Qty | Physical Qty | Variance) for each adjusted item; total items adjusted; total units of shrinkage (sum of negative variances as a positive number); refund amount issued; and clearance sale pre-tax total.
